description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular body with a dark, matte finish, suggesting a construction primarily of metal. The stock is straight and textured, likely for improved grip, and is colored in a deep reddish-brown, contrasting with the rest of the weapon. The receiver is boxy and has two prominent raised sections on the top, possibly for mounting sights or accessories. The barrel is relatively short and extends directly from the main body, ending in a simple muzzle with no visible attachments. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function. The rifle appears to be a compact, tactical weapon suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, dark metal rifle with a straight, textured reddish-brown stock and a boxy receiver, designed for tactical use. The barrel is short and unadorned, and the overall look is utilitarian.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the textured stock and boxy receiver.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view showing the narrow profile and the alignment of the stock with the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same features visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock, showing its cylindrical, textured grip.
